_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Representative histological image showing the fiber tip location and expression of dLight1.2 (stained for GFP, green) and dopaminergic terminal tyrosine hydroxylase (TH, Red)
details: Successfully used for immunofluorescence staining of dopaminergic terminals and neurons in VTA and striatal regions
